'''pangara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fodderer|fodderer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fodderer|fodderer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pangara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pængæræth|pængæræth]] || [[word:pængæræj|pængæræj]] || [[word:pængæræsh|pængæræsh]] || [[word:pængæræ|pængæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangangarath|pangangarath]] || [[word:pangangaraj|pangangaraj]] || [[word:pangangarash|pangangarash]] || [[word:pangangara|pangangara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pangarath|pangarath]] || [[word:pangaraj|pangaraj]] || [[word:pangarash|pangarash]] || [[word:pangara|pangara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangafrath|pangafrath]] || [[word:pangafraj|pangafraj]] || [[word:pangafrash|pangafrash]] || [[word:pangafraf|pangafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pangaratha|pangaratha]] || [[word:pangaraja|pangaraja]] || [[word:pangarasha|pangarasha]] || [[word:pangaraka|pangaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pangarath|pangarath]] || [[word:pangaraj|pangaraj]] || [[word:pangarash|pangarash]] || [[word:pangara|pangara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pangarathal|pangarathal]] || [[word:pangarajal|pangarajal]] || [[word:pangarashal|pangarashal]] || [[word:pangarakal|pangarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pangarathatha|pangarathatha]] || [[word:pangarajaja|pangarajaja]] || [[word:pangarashasha|pangarashasha]] || [[word:pangaraka|pangaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pangarathan|pangarathan]] || [[word:pangarajan|pangarajan]] || [[word:pangarashan|pangarashan]] || [[word:pangarakan|pangarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pangarathaoro|pangarathaoro]] || [[word:pangarajaoro|pangarajaoro]] || [[word:pangarashaoro|pangarashaoro]] || [[word:pangarakaoro|pangarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
